identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a 'Bio-Metric Finance' aesthetic that blends organic health with precise data analytics.
principles: Fusion: Mix 'Botanical Freshness' with 'High-Frequency Trading' visuals.
Emotion: Empower users to feel control over both health and budget.
Content: Data is beautiful. Highlight the 'Calories per Dollar' metric as the hero.
Contrast: Soft organic shapes for food images vs. sharp mono-spaced numbers for costs.

usage.h1: font-outfit font-extrabold text-5xl md:text-7xl tracking-tight leading-none
usage.caption: font-inter text-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground

layout.spacing_scale: Generous (2x standard). Use p-8, p-12 for sections.

alignment.text: Left aligned by default. Center ONLY for major hero headlines.

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-outfit font-bold tracking-wide shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 font-medium

cards.style: bg-card border border-border/50 shadow-sm rounded-2xl hover:border-primary/20 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: h-12 rounded-xl bg-background border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all font-inter

tables.header: bg-muted/50 font-outfit text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground

receipt_scanner.dropzone: border-2 border-dashed border-primary/30 rounded-3xl bg-primary/5 hover:bg-primary/10 transition-colors flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[300px] cursor-pointer group

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 shadow-lg

gradients.hero_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-primary via-emerald-500 to-teal-400

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-border. Use 'border-r' or 'border-b' on grid items for a technical look.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-xl for floating elements/modals.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is APCA compliant. No grey text on grey backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Add fonts via Google Fonts link in index.html.
THEME: Implement the dual-theme toggle immediately. Default to 'System' preference.
SHADCN: Customize the default radius to '0.75rem' (rounded-xl) for a friendlier feel.
NOTIFICATIONS: Use 'sonner' for all success/error messages.
CHARTS: Use 'recharts' via shadcn/charts for the calorie/$ analysis.
OCR MOCK: If OCR API is not ready, mock the response with a 2-second delay and dummy data.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for dark colors.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for Headings. Use 'Outfit'.
Do NOT use standard HTML Select/Datepicker. Use Shadcn components.
